summary: Complete testing of Listing Detail Modal feature for The Honeypot Shop. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for GET /api/listings/{listing_id} enriched endpoint. Frontend: All modal features verified including album art, artist/album typography (Playfair Display/Cormorant Garamond), condition pill, seller info with rating stars and sales count, price display, CTA buttons (propose a trade for TRADE listings, correctly hidden for own listings), wantlist toggle, URL deep linking, and modal dismiss methods.

issues: Some seller photos show broken images (white squares) when photo URLs are invalid or missing

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/listings/{id} returns 200 for valid listing
Backend: Response includes user object with id, username, avatar_url
Backend: user.rating field present (default 5.0)
Backend: user.completed_sales field present (integer)
Backend: similar_listings array present
Backend: on_wantlist boolean present
Backend: Required fields (id, artist, album, listing_type, status) all present
Backend: GET /api/listings/{invalid-id} returns 404
Backend: Unauthenticated request returns on_wantlist=false
Backend: GET /api/listings returns list with type filter working
Backend: Listing type filter (BUY_NOW, MAKE_OFFER, TRADE) works correctly
Frontend: Clicking listing card opens ListingDetailModal
Frontend: Modal shows album art (cover_url or photo_urls[0])
Frontend: Modal shows artist name in Playfair Display font
Frontend: Modal shows album name in Cormorant Garamond italic
Frontend: Modal shows year and pressing notes
Frontend: Modal shows condition pill with color-coded styling
Frontend: Modal shows seller avatar, username, rating stars (5), and completed sales count
Frontend: Modal shows price in large $XX format
Frontend: Modal shows 'or make an offer' text for MAKE_OFFER listings
Frontend: Modal shows 'Open to trades' text for TRADE listings
Frontend: Modal shows CTA buttons for non-owned listings (propose a trade)
Frontend: Modal correctly hides CTA buttons for user's own listings
Frontend: Modal shows wantlist toggle ('add to wantlist'/'on your wantlist')
Frontend: Wantlist toggle adds item to ISO wantlist with toast confirmation
Frontend: Modal dismisses via X button
Frontend: Modal dismisses via Escape key
Frontend: Modal dismisses via clicking outside
Frontend: URL updates to /honeypot/listing/{id} when modal opens
Frontend: Deep linking works - navigating to /honeypot/listing/{id} opens modal after login
Frontend: ListingCard no longer has inline Buy/Offer/Trade buttons
Frontend: Entire ListingCard is clickable to open modal
Frontend: Seller username link has correct href to /profile/{username}
Frontend: Google Analytics gtag script loads correctly
Frontend: GA Measurement ID G-KEL18TSP0N correctly configured
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about DialogContent missing DialogTitle - already has aria-describedby but Radix UI suggests adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle for screen readers
Some test listings have broken/missing photo URLs showing white squares - data quality issue, not code issue
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user and trader user listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Listing Detail Modal feature fully tested. Modal opens when clicking any listing card on Shop or Trade tabs. For own listings, CTA and wantlist sections are hidden. For other users' listings, shows 'propose a trade' button (TRADE type), or 'make an offer'/'buy at asking price' buttons (MAKE_OFFER type), or 'buy now' button (BUY_NOW type). Wantlist toggle adds item to user's ISO/wantlist. URL updates to /honeypot/listing/{id} for deep linking. Modal dismisses via X, Escape, or clicking outside. Seller link navigates to /profile/{username}. GA tracking with ID G-KEL18TSP0N is working.

listing_card.changes: No inline action buttons - entire card clickable to open modal
